tracks.title: SleepyLofySong
tracks.description: Sleepy lofi to listen to while working or studying

tracks.title: 霧の朝まで – Until the Misty Morning
tracks.description: An extra-sleepy lounge track made for late-night drifting into early morning. Very soft, steady, and comforting.

tracks.title: 曇りガラス – Fogged Glass
tracks.description: A minimal, sleepy bossa track with soft “quiet room” energy. Gentle and smooth, like tracing shapes on fogged glass.

tracks.title: トーストの音 – The Sound of Toast
tracks.description: A soft, slightly dreamy lounge track about comfort foods and half-energy days. Smooth rhythm, warm mood, no stress.

tracks.title: 終電のあと – After the Last Train
tracks.description: A quiet late-night station mood in bossa/lounge form: calm, reflective, and steady. Feels like the city breathing after everything ends.

tracks.title: レモンの月 – Lemon Moon
tracks.description: Dreamy, mellow lounge pop with warm chords and a sleepy “moonlight” feel. Smooth enough to loop for hours without getting tiring.

tracks.title: 街灯とミント – Streetlight & Mint
tracks.description: A night stroll bossa track with cool, fresh calm. Gentle rhythm and soft imagery that keeps the mood relaxed and steady.

tracks.title: 午前のやわらかさ – Morning Softness
tracks.description: A light, sleepy morning lounge track that feels like soft daylight through curtains. Peaceful and minimal, for starting the day slowly.

tracks.title: 海辺の信号 – Seaside Traffic Light
tracks.description: A breezy, coastal bossa track with gentle warmth and slow confidence. Feels like walking near the sea with soft city lights behind you.

tracks.title: 夜ふかしのラテ – Late-Night Latte
tracks.description: Soft, warm bossa lounge with a “late-night latte” vibe: mellow, comforting, and slightly dreamy. Made for nights when you can’t sleep but don’t want noise.

tracks.title: ページの隅で – In the Corner of a Page
tracks.description: A gentle bookshop-style bossa track with a quiet, comforting story. Smooth, sleepy, and perfect for reading or journaling.

tracks.title: 雨のカウンター – Rain Counter
tracks.description: Rainy-night lounge bossa with soft rhythm and warm lighting vibes. It’s the feeling of sitting by the window while the world slows down outside.

tracks.title: 交差点ブルー – Intersection Blue
tracks.description: A more upbeat “city jazz pop” track with a tight groove and forward motion, but still smooth and stylish. The chorus is built to feel confident without getting loud.

tracks.title: 砂糖ひとつ分 – One Sugar
tracks.description: A cozy, classy Shibuya-kei bossa track that feels like a quiet reset. Gentle groove, warm chords, and a soft vocal that stays close and comforting.

tracks.title: カフェの窓ぎわ – By the Café Window
tracks.description: A warm Japanese bossa nova / lounge pop track with brushed drums, Rhodes piano, and a mellow late-night café atmosphere. Soft and sleepy, made for winding down and letting your thoughts slow down.
